holdings.infoBox: FDM is an equity ETF with a total of 150 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dauch stock at 2.07%, Stoke Therapeutics at 1.98%, TETRA Technologies at 1.80%, NWPX Infrastructure at 1.68%, and Douglas Dynamics at 1.44%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dow Jones Select MicroCap Index Fund (FDM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the DJ Select Micro-Cap index. The fund tracks an index of U.S.-listed stocks in the bottom two market-cap deciles. Only stocks that meet fundamental and liquidity thresholds are included in the index. FDM was launched on Sep 27, 2005 and is issued by First Trust.
